projects.title: Property Map Generator
projects.description: A Python tool that converts GPS field data into professional, print-ready property maps with automatic coordinate transformation, boundary detection, and customizable cartographic styling.
projects.details: Built with Python, GDAL and ReportLab/Matplotlib. Reads GPS waypoints from CSV or GPX, reprojects to the national coordinate system (PT-TM06/ETRS89), detects parcel boundaries and generates a georeferenced PDF map ready for submission to land registry or municipal services.

projects.title: Ecoturismo Portugal Portal
projects.description: A comprehensive web mapping portal showcasing hiking and ecotourism routes across Portugal, built with Django, PostGIS, and Leaflet for interactive route exploration.
projects.details: Django/GeoDjango backend with a PostGIS spatial database for route storage and querying. Integrates a GPX upload pipeline with automatic SRTM elevation enrichment via the Open-Elevation API, a PDF-to-GPX converter powered by FastAPI, and an interactive Leaflet map with route filtering by difficulty, region and activity type.

projects.title: Municipal GIS Architecture — Consultancy Case Study
projects.description: Full open-source GIS platform proposal for a Portuguese municipality of 120,000 inhabitants, covering Sentinel-2 automation, agricultural cadastre, and public transparency portal.
projects.details: A structured consultancy deliverable covering geospatial infrastructure design, technology selection and implementation roadmap. Modules include automated Sentinel-2 imagery ingestion with Apache Airflow, an agricultural cadastre management layer in PostGIS/GeoServer, a public-facing transparency portal built with Leaflet, and a Docker-based deployment architecture sized for municipal IT capacity.

projects.title: Referee Bias Detection System (CAL)
projects.description: Statistical anomaly detection system for referee decision-making in Portuguese football, using binomial z-scores, Benjamini-Hochberg FDR correction, and Poisson regression across 2,673 matches.
projects.details: A full-stack analytical platform running on Docker/PostgreSQL/Streamlit. For each referee decision type (yellow cards, penalties, injury time), the system computes binomial z-scores against league-wide baselines, applies Benjamini-Hochberg FDR correction to control for multiple testing, and fits Poisson regression models to isolate home/away effects. Covers 9 seasons (2017/18–2025/26) of the Portuguese Primeira Liga.

projects.title: NaturalMed Website
projects.description: Bilingual static website (EN/PT) for a Traditional Chinese Medicine clinic in Wales, UK. Built with vanilla HTML, CSS and JavaScript — no framework dependencies — with zero hosting cost.
projects.details: Fully static site hosted on GitHub Pages with a CI/CD pipeline built on GitHub Actions. Content is managed through Sveltia CMS (a Git-based headless CMS) authenticated via a Cloudflare Workers OAuth proxy. A Python build script (build_articles.py) converts Markdown articles to HTML, updates the article listing and automatically generates an HTML newsletter. Includes GDPR-compliant cookie consent (UK GDPR + EU GDPR) and a jsPDF browser-side flyer generator.

projects.title: NaturalMed Clinic Manager
projects.description: Full-featured clinic management system for a Traditional Chinese Medicine practitioner. Covers patient intake, treatment notes, herbal prescriptions, invoicing and stock control. Deployed on a cloud VPS with HTTPS and multi-factor authentication.
projects.details: Built iteratively over 3 months as a solo developer. Django 5.1 backend with 19 database models across 9 apps (tenants, accounts, patients, appointments, treatment, billing, stock, expenses, prescriptions). Clinical features include structured SOAP notes, TCM tongue/pulse diagnosis with photography upload, a herbal formula library, and a Stems & Branches (Ganzhi 干支) astrological calculator. Administrative features cover invoicing with VAT and PDF export, a service catalogue with Quick Select billing, expense tracking with financial summary charts, stock management with purchase orders, and multi-tenancy for multiple clinic instances. Deployed on Hetzner Cloud with Docker Compose, Nginx, Gunicorn, Redis, Celery, Let's Encrypt SSL and automated daily backups.
